about.title: We're not a wellness brand. We're a transformation studio.
about.lede: Liv Functional was built to close the gap between what science knows about health and what real women can actually do on a Tuesday morning.
about.body: Founded by Amro Ghamrawy, Liv Functional is a bilingual wellness studio rooted in functional medicine, behaviour change, and metabolic health. We work with women across the GCC, Europe, and North America who are tired of one-size-fits-all wellness.

myStory.title: My story.
myStory.lede: From burnt-out operator to functional wellness practitioner.
myStory.body: I spent a decade building businesses while my own health quietly broke. The path back wasn't a 30-day detox — it was a system. Liv Functional is that system, taught back.

howItWorks.title: How working with us works.

faq.title: 1:1 Discovery Consultation — FAQ
faq.lede: Real answers about how the session works and what you'll walk away with.

items.q: Is this consultation right for me?
items.a: If you feel like something in your body isn't working the way it should but you don't have clarity on why, this is exactly where to start. This session is ideal if you want real answers and a clear direction, not guesswork.

items.q: What makes this different from a regular nutrition consultation?
items.a: Most consultations give general advice. This session focuses on identifying root causes, connecting your symptoms to your lifestyle and biology, and giving you a clear, prioritized strategy. You're not leaving with more information; you're leaving with direction.

items.q: Will I get a meal plan?
items.a: It depends. This is a strategy session, not a full program. You will get clear nutrition guidance and direction, but not a fully customized meal plan. If you need that level of detail, you'll be guided to the right next step.

items.q: Do I need to have blood work or lab tests?
items.a: No, but if you have them, bring them. If not, we work with your symptoms, lifestyle patterns, and history to identify what's likely happening.

items.q: How should I prepare for the session?
items.a: You'll receive a pre-session intake form or a screening call to welcome you. During this call we'll ask you certain questions to prepare you for the meeting with Reham. Be honest and detailed; the quality of your answers directly impacts the accuracy of your strategy.

items.q: What exactly will I walk away with?
items.a: A clear understanding of what's going on in your body, the main factors holding you back, a personalized action plan, and immediate steps you can start the same day.
For clarity, yes. For full transformation, no. This session gives you the roadmap. Implementation and deeper work may require ongoing support, depending on your goals.

items.q: Will this help with weight loss / blood sugar / hormones?
items.a: Yes — if those issues are connected to your lifestyle, nutrition, or metabolic function. This session identifies what's driving those issues and shows you how to start correcting them.

items.q: What if I've already tried everything?
items.a: You probably haven't tried the right strategy for your body. Most people repeat the same approaches without understanding why they're not working. That's exactly what we fix here.
No. This is a time-based, personalized service. Once booked, your slot is reserved.

items.q: How do I book my session?
items.a: Simply click the Book Your Consultation button and choose your time slot.
You'll receive a confirmation email, your intake form, and instructions for the session.
